title: Babyoye Global Group is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Babyoye Global Group is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Babyoye Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Babyoye Global Group:
Babyoye Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Babyoye Global Group!
